name: Tako Data Visualization MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from TakoData (TakoData org) for Tako — a data visualization and querying platform. Enables AI agents to query real-time data and generate charts, graphs, and visualizations by integrating Tako's data engine. Agents can generate on-demand data visualizations without coding chart libraries directly.
use_cases: Generating data charts and visualizations from analytics agents
Querying real-time data with automatic chart generation from dashboard agents
Creating visual data summaries from reporting agents
Integrating auto-generated charts into AI-driven analytics workflows
not_for: Teams not using Tako platform (visualization engine is Tako-specific)
Complex custom visualizations requiring full charting library control
Offline or local-only data visualization without Tako cloud
best_when: An analytics agent needs to generate charts and visual data summaries on demand — using Tako's cloud visualization engine without managing charting libraries or rendering infrastructure.
avoid_when: You need full control over chart customization or are not using Tako's data platform. Tako provides opinionated data visualization.

auth.notes: Tako API key required. Register at trytako.com for access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier for development; check trytako.com for current limits
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid plans for higher query volume and data sources
pricing.notes: Startup-stage data visualization platform. Pricing evolving — check trytako.com.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply by tier; check Tako documentation

known_agent_gotchas: Early-stage startup — API may evolve rapidly; verify compatibility regularly
Visualization output format depends on Tako's rendering — test with target AI client
Data queried through Tako is sent to Tako's cloud — review data handling for sensitive datasets
Official from TakoData org — purpose-built MCP for their visualization platform
agent_readiness.security_notes: Data queries flow through Tako cloud. API key auth. HTTPS. Startup — review data handling policy before sending sensitive data for visualization.

security_score_components.security_notes: Data sent to Tako cloud for visualization. API key auth. Review data handling before production use.
